scripts.build:vercel: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate:deploy:vercel && next build
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy:vercel: if [ "$VERCEL_ENV" = "production" ] && [ "$RUN_DB_MIGRATIONS" = "true" ]; then if [ -z "$DIRECT_URL" ]; then echo "DIRECT_URL is required to run Prisma migrations on Vercel production"; exit 1; fi; echo "Running prisma migrate deploy on Vercel production"; prisma migrate deploy; else echo "Skipping prisma migrate deploy (VERCEL_ENV=$VERCEL_ENV, RUN_DB_MIGRATIONS=$RUN_DB_MIGRATIONS)"; fi
